title: Why You Wake Up Tired Even After 8 Hours of Sleep After 40
primary_keyword: wake up tired after 8 hours sleep over 40
tags: tired after sleeping, sleep quality after 40, wake up tired, progesterone sleep, cortisol morning, deep sleep women
excerpt: If you sleep 8 hours but still wake up exhausted, the problem is not how long you sleep. After 40, hormonal shifts disrupt deep sleep stages, leaving you tired no matter how much time you spend in bed.
seo_title: Why You Wake Up Tired After 8 Hours of Sleep After 40
meta_description: Waking up tired after 8 hours? Learn why progesterone drops, cortisol spikes, and estrogen changes disrupt deep sleep after 40, and what actually helps.
